summary: LiteLLM is an open-source AI Gateway that provides a unified interface to interact with over 100 LLM providers using the OpenAI format, simplifying the integration process. It serves as both a Python SDK for direct library use and a deployable proxy server for centralized team access.
use_cases: Integrating multiple LLMs into a single application
Switching between LLM providers without code changes
Managing API keys and usage tracking for different LLMs
